testPlanDescription: Comprehensive functional tests for admin pages - includes navigation, forms, modals, data display, pagination, and user interactions. Tests require authentication with admin credentials.

authentication.note: Admin credentials should be provided via environment variables TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL and TEST_ADMIN_PASSWORD, or passed as command-line arguments

additionalInstructions: Comprehensive admin pages tests. First test (ADMIN-001) handles login authentication. All subsequent tests assume user is already authenticated. Tests include: page loads, navigation between pages, form interactions (create/edit modals), data display, pagination, search/filter functionality, and button clicks. Tests verify functionality but do NOT submit forms or delete data - they only verify UI elements are accessible and modals open correctly.
notes: This configuration requires admin credentials. Set TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL and TEST_ADMIN_PASSWORD environment variables, or pass them via command-line arguments. The test script will handle authentication automatically. Comprehensive tests take longer to execute than sanity tests (15-30 minutes).
